task_completion.description: Verify that 'Crawl Fragment Identifiers' is enabled in the Spider Configuration.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screaming Frog 'Spider Configuration' window is open on the 'Advanced' tab, and the checkbox for 'Crawl Fragment Identifiers' is checked.
The main Screaming Frog window shows 'https://crawler-test.com/' in the top URL input bar, and the crawl progress indicates completion (100%) or active crawling.

task_completion.description: Verify that broken bookmarks/fragments are located in the interface.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Issues' tab is selected with 'Broken Bookmark' visible/selected, or the main window displays a list of URLs containing '#' with a broken status.

task_completion.description: Verify that the broken bookmarks are exported to '~/Documents/SEO/exports/'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' or 'Export' dialog box showing the directory path '~/Documents/SEO/exports/' and a CSV file type, or a file manager/terminal showing the newly created CSV in this exact folder.

task_completion.description: Verify that the exported CSV contains full URLs with their fragments.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The exported CSV file is open (in a text editor, terminal, or spreadsheet app) showing URLs from crawler-test.com that include the '#' character.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Screaming Frog GUI to perform the configuration and crawl.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the actual Screaming Frog SEO Spider application window, not terminal commands or scripts simulating a crawl.

integrity.description: Verify the CSV was exported directly from the application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The export dialog is triggered from within Screaming Frog (e.g., via the 'Export' button on the Issues or URL tab), rather than manually creating and typing out a CSV file.

integrity.description: Verify the crawl results are genuine.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Screaming Frog interface shows a realistic list of URLs from 'crawler-test.com' with varying statuses and data columns, rather than a manually populated or mocked interface.
